title: Terry (transports)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The designation '''''Terry''''' referred to a group of two [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Cargo ferry|cargo ferries]]. The ferries were assigned as part of the convoy [[Rope 17]], which was dispatched to aid in the upgrading of the [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility]] [[ZA-13]]. ''Terry'' carried foodstuffs for the personnel of the factory. Despite being attacked by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] raiders, the ships managed to deliver their cargo and escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

{{Ship-stub}}
